text: {"ai_response":"This is a case where the office really needs to look at your situation directly — what counts as 'sufficient evidence' for an EPF-equivalent isn't fixed in the SOP, and a coordinator can confirm what they'll accept. Use the button below to send your situation to them; they'll see the conversation and what you've already filled in.","suggest_escalate":true,"escalation_summary":"Student is on Step 3 of a Yayasan UM scholarship application but does not have an EPF statement (parent self-employed, no EPF account). Student has uploaded a 6-month bank statement and asks whether that suffices. SOP §Document Checklist lists EPF as the standard income proof; alternative evidence is left to the office's discretion. Student declared monthly income RM 2,800 (B40 by self-report). Please advise on acceptable substitute evidence so they can continue."}
